title: Recognition of two columns in CRM Accounts Board (not just the name)
excerpt: an automation for a Lead board to check two columns in the account board to see if there is already an account based on the TWO columns and not just the name column

posts.author: ragdavis3008 (RD)

posts.author: Clover_Gal (Desiree McCarthy | monday.com Ambassador)
posts.cookedHtml: Is this an either or situation or both? Ie if either one is the same, does that count?
